mapper.select: SELECT l.level_id AS levelId, l.level_name AS levelName, l.min_growth AS minGrowth, l.max_growth AS maxGrowth, COALESCE(u.growth_value, 0) AS growthValue, l.delivery_discount_rate AS deliveryDiscountRate, l.remind_cooldown_seconds AS remindCooldownSeconds, l.priority_flag AS priorityFlag, l.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN user_level l ON u.level_id = l.level_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT level_id AS levelId, level_name AS levelName, min_growth AS minGrowth, max_growth AS maxGrowth, delivery_discount_rate AS deliveryDiscountRate, remind_cooldown_seconds AS remindCooldownSeconds, priority_flag AS priorityFlag, description FROM user_level WHERE #{growthValue} BETWEEN min_growth AND max_growth ORDER BY level_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT level_id AS levelId, level_name AS levelName, min_growth AS minGrowth, max_growth AS maxGrowth, delivery_discount_rate AS deliveryDiscountRate, remind_cooldown_seconds AS remindCooldownSeconds, priority_flag AS priorityFlag, description FROM user_level WHERE min_growth > #{growthValue} ORDER BY min_growth ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_growth_log(user_id, order_id, change_value, reason) VALUES(#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{changeValue}, #{reason})
